narrative:
Cols 58-E (precinct in Franklin County) has 1,076 registered voters, with 65.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 14.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 20.2%, a modest Democratic lean of 5.9 percentage points.
